title: B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates:
B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates!
